title: Oslo Whiskey Decanter Set, 7-Piece Crystal Glass Set with 1100ml Diamond Cut Decanter and 6 Tumblers (275ml), Classic Carafe for Alcohol, Scotch, Rum, Whisky
features: COMPLETE SET: Luxurious 7-piece set includes a 1100ml crystal decanter and 6 matching whiskey tumblers (275ml each) with elegant diamond-cut design
PREMIUM CRAFTSMANSHIP: Exquisite vertical line pattern and diamond-cut base showcase superior glass artistry and exceptional attention to detail
PERFECT CAPACITY: 1100ml decanter provides ample space for spirits, whilst 275ml tumblers offer ideal serving portions for whiskey appreciation
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for various spirits including whiskey, scotch, bourbon, and rum, making it an excellent choice for home bars and entertaining
GIFT-WORTHY: Presented in an attractive gift box, this sophisticated decanter set makes an impressive gift for whiskey enthusiasts
description: Elevate your spirits with this exquisite RDK Oslo Whiskey Decanter Set includes a 1100ml glass decanter and six 275ml whiskey tumblers designed for serving whiskey, scotch, bourbon, or rum. Each tumbler fits large ice cubes and is suitable for drinks served neat or on the rocks, including Old Fashioneds, Negronis, and mixed spirits. The classic diamond-cut pattern adorning each piece catches and reflects light brilliantly, creating an atmosphere of refined elegance. The decanter's sturdy stopper ensures your finest spirits remain perfectly preserved, while the weighted base provides excellent stability. Made from lead-free glass, this set does not absorb odors and resists scratches or deformation over time. Whether displayed in your home bar or given as a thoughtful gift, this timeless set combines functionality with sophisticated style or as a whiskey gift set for men.
